name: Timofei Bazhukov
role: Senior IT Engineer at the LEGO Group
description: Experienced SAP professional with 10+ years in technical leadership, SAP development, system integration, and cross-platform mobile app creation.

skills.description: Comprehensive expertise spanning SAP technologies, ABAP development, cloud platforms, and modern web/mobile frameworks. Skilled in delivering scalable solutions, integrating systems, and leveraging best practices across diverse technical stacks.

expertise.description: More than 10 years in SAP engineering roles, including senior and technical leadership positions. Deep expertise in SAP development, system integration, and fostering best coding practices within the SAP ecosystem.

technicalStack.description: Advanced skills in SAP technologies: SAP Fiori, SAPUI5, ABAP (transactions, enhancements), OData/SOAP web services, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), and database management including HANA and MongoDB.

currentFocus.description: Driving SAP governance, architecture, and cybersecurity initiatives, ensuring alignment with modern digital platform principles and enterprise standards.

mobileDevelopment.description: Experienced in developing cross-platform mobile applications with React Native, Flutter, and Node.js, published on both App Store and Google Play.

softSkills.description: Effective leader and collaborator, skilled in business analysis, project management, and technical architecture, with a strong background in Supply Chain and scalable solution design.

experience.overview: A curated selection of key projects across SAP and non-SAP domains. Each showcases hands-on development, architectural insight, and business impact through practical engineering solutions.

Proactively embracing the latest advancements in SAP technology aligned with company Digital Platform principles and Data Security governance. Designing and developing cutting-edge solutions that drive business success.
